name: claude-code-companions
description: Collection of Claude Code plugins: specialized agents, code review skills, git workflows, dependency management, and observability

plugins.name: task-orchestrator
plugins.description: Project analysis and planning agent — decomposes complex tasks, creates implementation plans, identifies risks and dependencies

plugins.name: tech-oracle
plugins.description: Technical architect agent — manages .architecture.yaml, creates ADRs, evaluates technology choices and design patterns

plugins.name: gopher-builder
plugins.description: Go developer agent — TDD specialist for cloud-native Go applications with Echo, slog, and cockroachdb/errors

plugins.name: snake-charmer
plugins.description: Python developer agent — TDD specialist treating code as art, with FastAPI, Pydantic, structlog, and strict typing

plugins.name: templ-weaver
plugins.description: Frontend specialist — Go Templ + HTMX with server-first rendering and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility

plugins.name: kube-pilot
plugins.description: Kubernetes specialist — creates secure, production-ready K8s manifests and ArgoCD applications with zero-trust networking

plugins.name: chart-builder
plugins.description: Helm chart TDD specialist — creates production-ready Helm charts with helm-unittest following .architecture.yaml standards

plugins.name: docker-smith
plugins.description: Containerization specialist — creates optimized, secure Containerfiles with multi-stage builds and distroless base images

plugins.name: code-guardian
plugins.description: Code quality validation agent — runs linters, tests, security checks, and verifies .architecture.yaml compliance

plugins.name: doc-curator
plugins.description: AI artifact cleanup agent — detects and removes AI-generated comments, excessive documentation, and non-professional code patterns

plugins.name: review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive code review pipeline: branch review, PR final review with dual-model analysis (Claude + Codex), and GitHub PR review publishing with evidence-based verification

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git workflow utilities: fork refresh and repo setup with branch protection

plugins.name: genname
plugins.description: Generate a /rename command from type, title, and optional PR number — pure string formatting utility

plugins.name: tldrpr
plugins.description: Generate concise plain-text TLDR summaries for GitHub Pull Requests, ready for pasting into Slack or other messengers

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Analyze the current session and extract key learnings into CLAUDE.md files and memory system

plugins.name: renovate-check
plugins.description: Run Renovate locally in dry-run mode to discover available dependency updates, research migration guides for major bumps, and apply selected updates

plugins.name: agent-father
plugins.description: Interactive skill for creating well-structured Claude Code subagents following official documentation standards

plugins.name: m4b-audiobook
plugins.description: Assemble m4b audiobook from audio files with chapters, metadata, and cover art using ffmpeg

plugins.name: mcp-loki
plugins.description: MCP server for querying Grafana Loki logs — LogQL queries, label discovery, series exploration, and index statistics

plugins.name: mcp-transmission
plugins.description: MCP server for managing Transmission BitTorrent client — list, add, remove, start, stop torrents, session stats, queue and bandwidth management
